mapper.select: SELECT f.id, u.email AS user_email, tu.nickname AS trainer_name, f.comment AS content, f.feedback_date AS session_date, f.summary AS exercise, f.comment AS food, f.summary AS inbody, f.comment AS feedback, f.summary AS growth, f.next_comment AS next_plan FROM FEEDBACK f JOIN WORKOUT_LOG wl ON f.workout_id = wl.id JOIN MEMBER m ON wl.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON f.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER tu ON t.user_id = tu.id WHERE u.email = #{email} ORDER BY f.feedback_date DESC

SELECT f.id, u.email AS user_email, tu.nickname AS trainer_name, f.comment AS content, f.feedback_date AS session_date, f.summary AS exercise, f.comment AS food, f.summary AS inbody, f.comment AS feedback, f.summary AS growth, f.next_comment AS next_plan FROM FEEDBACK f JOIN WORKOUT_LOG wl ON f.workout_id = wl.id JOIN MEMBER m ON wl.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN TRAINER t ON f.trainer_id = t.id LEFT JOIN USER tu ON t.user_id = tu.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FEEDBACK (workout_id, feedback_date, summary, comment, next_comment, trainer_id) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM WORKOUT_LOG WHERE member_id = (SELECT id FROM MEMBER WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM USER WHERE email = #{userEmail})) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1), NOW(), #{exercise}, #{content}, #{nextPlan}, (SELECT id FROM TRAINER WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM USER WHERE nickname = #{trainerName}) LIMIT 1) )
